channel.title: Computer-Science on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Computer-Science on Arrans github.io

item.title: papers-we-love/papers-we-love
item.description: Papers from the computer science community to read and discuss.

item.title: mtdvio/every-programmer-should-know
item.description: A collection of (mostly) technical things every software developer should know about

item.title: kamranahmedse/design-patterns-for-humans
item.description: An ultra-simplified explanation to design patterns

item.title: binhnguyennus/awesome-scalability
item.description: The Patterns of Scalable, Reliable, and Performant Large-Scale Systems
